name: Bound by Blood

abilities.name: Family Values
abilities.text: When this model declares the Prepare action, it may gain a Familia token instead of other tokens.

abilities.name: Armed and Ready
abilities.text: After this model resolves the Prepare action, it may move up to 3".

actions.name: "¡A por Él!"
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Another ally only.
actions.effects: Target declares a (missile) action printed on their stat card.

extraction_notes: The action name uses Spanish punctuation (¡...!)
The action icon (missile) appears in the effects text
The signature icon appears before the action name in the table
